walkthrough_summary: A synthetic opportunity moved through opportunity_discovered -> scored -> classified -> briefed -> (claims_validated fast-forward, gated on all brief claims validated and at least one recorded source) -> editorial_review -> seo_review -> relationship_mapped -> approval_ready -> approved, with monetization classification recorded before the terminal human-approval call. A second opportunity was proven to stop at insufficient_evidence and could not be briefed. A third opportunity was proven to be rejected from human approval with a named, specific set of missing evidence gates when review, relationship mapping, and monetization classification were skipped. A fourth opportunity proved a retirement proposal requires an incoming-link audit reference, does not itself change opportunity status, and only the separate human decision call can move it to retired.
limitations: A fresh empty local D1 (via Miniflare) is not a staging or production schema export or a restored backup.
No rollback, remote non-production rehearsal, load test, or production migration was performed.
This receipt does not authorize staging or production migration, telemetry collection, feature-flag activation, or any outbound work.

The seven opportunity-intake sources without a real adapter (gsc, camp_gap, affiliate_gap, seasonal, newsletter, support, competitor, emerging_trend) were not exercised because no adapter exists yet; they throw a descriptive NotImplementedAdapterError rather than being silently untested.
